paragraphs.source: The MMA instruction is the core operation that performs matrix multiplication. MMA performance has grown increasingly shape-dependent from Hopper to Blackwell. Here we investigate this phenomenon, sweeping through different shapes and data types to quantify the performance differences.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The MMA instruction is the core operation that performs matrix multiplication. MMA performance has grown increasingly shape-dependent from Hopper to Blackwell. Here we investigate this phenomenon, sweeping through different shapes and data types to quantify the performance differences.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The MMA instruction is the core operation that performs matrix multiplication. MMA performance has grown increasingly shape-dependent from Hopper to Blackwell. Here we investigate this phenomenon, sweeping through different shapes and data types to quantify the performance differences.

pro.text: MMA 指令是执行矩阵乘法的核心操作。从 Hopper 到 Blackwell 架构，MMA 的性能变得越来越高度依赖矩阵形状。在此，我们对这一现象展开深入研究，通过遍历不同的矩阵形状和数据类型，来量化这些性能差异。

applied_terms: Translate 'shape-dependent' as '高度依赖矩阵形状'.
Translate 'sweeping through' as '遍历' or '参数扫描' (in the context of benchmarking different configurations).

understanding.role_in_article: Analyzes the core computation instructions (MMA) of Blackwell, focusing on how performance varies by matrix shape and data type.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the focus entirely from how data is fed (Memory Subsystem) to how it is computed (Tensor Cores).
understanding.relation_to_next: Sets up the conclusion of the article by tying microbenchmarks back to real-world use cases and the physical floorplan.
key_points: 5th Generation MMA performance has become increasingly shape-dependent compared to Hopper.
The section quantifies this dependence by sweeping through various matrix shapes and data types.
translation_notes: Translate 'shape-dependent' as '高度依赖矩阵形状'.
Translate 'sweeping through' as '遍历' or '参数扫描' (in the context of benchmarking different configurations).

issues.description: 翻译指南要求将 PTX 和 SASS 指令（及相关修饰符）格式化为行内代码。`.cta_group::2` 属于 PTX 指令修饰符，建议添加反引号以符合技术文档规范。

paragraphs.source: Blackwell comes with 2SM MMA, a new type of MMA instruction (.cta_group::2) where a CTA pair collaboratively executes one MMA operation across 2 SMs. Specifically, the input matrix A is duplicated while matrix B and D are sharded across the 2 SMs, and the CTA pair can access each other's shared memory. This enables even larger MMA shapes. We investigate whether 2SM MMA exhibits weak scaling, strong scaling, or both.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Blackwell comes with 2SM MMA, a new type of MMA instruction (`.cta_group::2`) where a CTA pair collaboratively executes one MMA operation across 2 SMs. Specifically, the input matrix A is duplicated while matrix B and D are sharded across the 2 SMs, and the CTA pair can access each other's shared memory. This enables even larger MMA shapes. We investigate whether 2SM MMA exhibits weak scaling, strong scaling, or both.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Blackwell comes with 2SM MMA, a new type of MMA instruction (.cta_group::2) where a CTA pair collaboratively executes one MMA operation across 2 SMs. Specifically, the input matrix A is duplicated while matrix B and D are sharded across the 2 SMs, and the CTA pair can access each other's shared memory. This enables even larger MMA shapes. We investigate whether 2SM MMA exhibits weak scaling, strong scaling, or both.

pro.text: Blackwell 引入了 2SM MMA，这是一种新型 MMA 指令（.cta_group::2）。在该指令下，一对协作线程阵列 (CTA) 跨两个 SM 协同执行一次 MMA 操作。具体而言，输入矩阵 A 会被复制，而矩阵 B 和矩阵 D 则分片分布在这两个 SM 上，并且这对 CTA 能够访问彼此的共享内存 (SMEM)。这使得支持更大尺寸的 MMA 矩阵形状成为可能。我们研究了 2SM MMA 是表现出弱扩展性、强扩展性，还是兼而有之。
pro.tokenized_text: Blackwell 引入了 2SM MMA，这是一种新型 MMA 指令（[[[CODE_1|.cta_group::2]]]）。在该指令下，一对协作线程阵列 (CTA) 跨两个 SM 协同执行一次 MMA 操作。具体而言，输入矩阵 A 会被复制，而矩阵 B 和矩阵 D 则分片分布在这两个 SM 上，并且这对 CTA 能够访问彼此的共享内存 (SMEM)。这使得支持更大尺寸的 MMA 矩阵形状成为可能。我们研究了 2SM MMA 是表现出弱扩展性、强扩展性，还是兼而有之。

applied_terms: Translate 'shape-dependent' as '高度依赖矩阵形状'.
Translate 'sweeping through' as '遍历' or '参数扫描' (in the context of benchmarking different configurations).

The section quantifies this dependence by sweeping through various matrix shapes and data types.
